compiled_state.title: Create structural test suite for using-dso sub-agent delegation section (RED)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What

Create `tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh` with structural boundary tests validating that the Sub-Agent Delegation section will exist and be well-formed in `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md` and `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md`. Add a RED marker to `.test-index` so the test gate tolerates the intentional failure between this task and the GREEN task.

## Why

TDD discipline: write the failing test first, then implement. Per Rule 5 of the behavioral testing standard, instruction-file tests target structural boundaries — grep-based checks for heading presence, pattern coverage, line-count constraints.

## testing_mode: RED

## Files to Modify
- `tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh` (CREATE)
- `.test-index` (ADD RED marker)

## TDD Requirement

Write the failing test `test_skill_md_has_delegation_section` that greps for `## Sub-Agent Delegation` in `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`. This will FAIL (RED) because the section does not exist yet. The test exits non-zero — the RED marker in .test-index allows the commit to proceed.

## Test Cases (5 structural tests)

1. `test_skill_md_has_delegation_section` — `## Sub-Agent Delegation` heading exists in SKILL.md
2. `test_skill_md_has_three_red_flag_patterns` — all 3 patterns present (sequential multi-file reads, serial independent file edits, inline self-review)
3. `test_skill_md_delegation_section_line_count` — section contains ≤60 rendered lines
4. `test_skill_md_has_recursive_scope_note` — scope-limiting note present (sub-agents must not re-spawn)
5. `test_hook_md_has_delegation_guidance` — HOOK-INJECTION.md contains delegation guidance

## Acceptance Criteria

### Universal
- Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]` (exits non-zero — RED state confirmed)
- Verify: `bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci 2>&1 | grep -v SKIP | tail -5`
- Verify: `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null || true`

### Task-Specific
- Verify: `test -x tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh`
- Verify: `grep -c 'test_skill_md_has_delegation_section\|test_skill_md_has_three_red_flag_patterns\|test_skill_md_delegation_section_line_count\|test_skill_md_has_recursive_scope_note\|test_hook_md_has_delegation_guidance' tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh | grep -qE '^5$'`
- Verify: `grep -q 'using-dso/SKILL.md.*test-using-dso-delegation' .test-index`

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6 — test file created, RED marker added, ACs verified
comments.author: Test
